decision.summary: No open position needs management and no new BTC market entry is justified now.
decision.rationale: Latest transcript and 2026-03-24 to 2026-03-26 summaries keep Beecthor’s thesis intact: short-term sweep/support around 67.9k-68.4k with possible rebound toward 73.26k-74.04k, but broader bias remains bearish with another lower low still expected.
